case_title: PARKIN SEAN VS WHITE DANNY M.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-20-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $780.00 FILED BY PARKIN SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE DANNY M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DANNY M. WHITE, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKIN SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE DANNY M. $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $58.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
